title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.004 - Law enforcement agencies, record of custody of child
text:
210.004.  Law enforcement agencies, record of custody of child. — All law enforcement agencies shall maintain a confidential record of the date and time a child less than seventeen years of age is taken into custody for any reason and the date and time such child is released from custody.
(L. 1995 H.B. 174, et al. § 2)
